meaning: n.(生化研究中使用的)佛波醇
examples: Objective To investigate the relationship between the phorbol 12-myristate 13-acetate (PMA) activated protein kinase C (PKC) and the subcellular expression of TorsinA protein.
Endogenetic ROS were produced by phorbol myristate acetate (PMA) stimulating human polymorphonuclear leukocytes (PMN), detected by CL and identified with specific antioxidants.
Objective: to detect expression of interleukin - 23 (il - 23) and il - 12 subunits in various leukemia cell lines and evaluate the ability of phorbol diester to up - regulate the subunits expression.
